Aurora County.description: Aurora County supports a diversified economy based on agriculture, healthcare services, transportation, agribusiness, renewable energy development, and local commerce. Farming operations remain a primary contributor to economic activity throughout the county.

Beadle County.description: Beadle County serves as an important economic center in eastern South Dakota, supported by healthcare services, manufacturing, agriculture, education, retail development, and professional services. Its diversified economy contributes significantly to regional employment and business growth.
